etimesDelhi’s biggest Metro fan? This man boards the first train of every new line– here’s his surprising storyFor 24 years, 65-year-old Anil Marwah has been the first passenger on every new Delhi Metro line, a tradition sparked by his fascination with Japan's transit system. He meticulously collects smart cards, photos, and clippings, documenting his 42nd journey on the latest Deepali Chowk to Majlis Park route. Marwah hopes to continue this unique passion.

etimesWatch: “It’s delicious!” Woman made butter chicken ice cream, but the internet says it’s “cursed”A viral social media video showcases a unique culinary creation: butter chicken ice cream. Content creator Juliette Moreno blended the popular Indian dish with cream, condensed milk, and sugar, then froze and churned it. The resulting orange-hued dessert has sparked widespread debate online, with reactions ranging from calling it 'cursed' to expressing curiosity about its taste.

etimesVideo: Child hangs and swings inside Mumbai Metro coach; authorities issue warning, call it a punishable offenceA video circulating online shows a young boy performing dangerous stunts inside a moving Mumbai Metro train, swinging from overhead bars and handles. The incident has prompted the metro authority to appeal to parents, emphasizing the risks to children and other passengers, and reminding them that such actions are punishable offenses.
